title: UniPM Synthetic Preventive Maintenance Dataset
description: A deterministic fictional development fixture for UniPM retrieval, API, and frontend testing. It is based on the visible fields of the supplied blank preventive-maintenance forms and does not represent actual General Services Department maintenance history.

sourceBasis.formTitle: Water Drinking Station Preventive Maintenance Form

assumptions: All assets, dates, findings, recommendations, actors, and identifiers in this file are fictional.
Only Page 1 of each supplied physical form was available when version 1.0.0 was created.
Page-2 checklist items and final acknowledgement, corrective-handoff, and RMRF rules remain provisional.
No real personnel names, contact details, signatures, employee IDs, or completed institutional records are included.
Quarterly schedules are used for fire extinguishers and water drinking stations.
Semester schedules are used for fire alarms and emergency lights.
Category-specific formData is retained for future schema expansion even when the current database seeder maps only generic fields.

categoryDetails.deviceParticulars: Manual call point and strobe assembly

inspections.remarks: mahina ang pressure, for refill
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Schedule the unit for refilling and perform a follow-up pressure check.

inspections.remarks: Pressure gauge below acceptable range; needs refill.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Endorse for refilling and reinspection before returning the unit to service.

inspections.remarks: Pressure restored after refilling; gauge reading is within the acceptable zone.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Continue regular quarterly monitoring.

inspections.remarks: kulang ang pressure at nasa red zone ang gauge
inspections.actionsRecommendations: For refilling and verification of gauge reading.

inspections.remarks: The indicator is approaching the refill section even though the cylinder has no visible damage.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Verify pressure and schedule refilling if the reading continues to decline.

inspections.remarks: Expired inspection tag observed.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Replace the inspection tag after verification and update the monitoring record.

inspections.remarks: Walang safety seal at maluwag ang pin.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Replace the missing seal and inspect the safety pin assembly.

inspections.remarks: Label is faded, but the pressure reading is normal and the unit is accessible.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Replace the faded label during the next scheduled service.

inspections.remarks: Operational and properly mounted; no low-pressure finding.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: No corrective action required.

inspections.remarks: Alarm panel fault reported during scheduled test.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Inspect panel indicators and verify the affected circuit.

inspections.remarks: Intermittent fault bumabalik sa alarm panel during reset.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Trace the intermittent panel fault and document the affected zone.

inspections.remarks: hindi nagrerespond ang smoke detector during test
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Clean and retest the detector; replace if still unresponsive.

inspections.remarks: Detector failed to report back to the panel until the third activation attempt.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Check detector connection and communication reliability.

inspections.remarks: Manual call point works but the strobe is not flashing.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Inspect the strobe circuit and replace the unit if defective.

inspections.remarks: Strobe restored after wiring was secured; call point and indicator are operational.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Continue semiannual testing.

inspections.remarks: All tested alarm devices, bell, and strobe responded normally.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: No corrective action required.

inspections.remarks: hindi umiilaw during power interruption test
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Check the battery and charging circuit.

inspections.remarks: Battery issue; emergency light is not lighting when mains power is removed.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Replace the battery and repeat the interruption test.

inspections.remarks: Unit lights normally after battery replacement.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Continue scheduled semiannual testing.

inspections.remarks: sira ang battery at ayaw mag-on
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Replace battery and inspect charging indicator.

inspections.remarks: Charging indicator remains off even after the unit is connected overnight.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Inspect charging circuit and battery terminals.

inspections.remarks: Unit turns on but dim ang ilaw and the test button is intermittent.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Inspect the battery, lamp output, and test switch.

inspections.remarks: Charging indicator is active and the emergency light operated normally.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: No corrective action required.

inspections.remarks: barado ang filter, mahina ang daloy
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Replace the sediment filter and inspect the carbon filter.

inspections.remarks: Clogged sediment filter caused weak water flow.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Replaced the sediment filter and checked the UV light.

inspections.remarks: The dispenser output slows after several uses even though no visible blockage is present.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Inspect internal filter saturation and replace filters if required.

inspections.remarks: may tagas near the dispenser connection
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Tighten the connection and inspect the hose and fitting.

inspections.remarks: Moisture returns around the outlet fitting several hours after the connection is dried.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Replace the worn fitting and confirm that the leak does not recur.

inspections.remarks: UV light not functioning during inspection.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Replace or service the UV lamp before continued use.

inspections.remarks: Water pressure is weak at the supply line, but the station filters are clean and there is no leak.
inspections.actionsRecommendations: Coordinate inspection of the building water supply; no filter replacement required.
